response.justification: Candidate has solid full-stack experience including a recent Staff Software Engineer title at re:cinq with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, which aligns with the AI-native engineering mindset. However, the resume shows limited evidence of deep Python expertise (skills list omits Python entirely) and the distributed systems experience is mostly from Dunnhumby/Sociomantic 6+ years ago. The recent Staff role was only 6 months and ended in a career gap, raising questions about scope and tenure at staff level.
strengths: Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflows
Prior high-throughput distributed systems experience at Sociomantic (millions of HTTP req/sec)
Strong TypeScript/Node.js background plus craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based)
concerns: Python is not listed in skills — a must-have for the role
Most recent Staff role was brief (6 months) followed by a career gap; limited evidence of sustained staff-level technical strategy impact
Distributed systems depth is dated; recent work skews toward product/full-stack rather than high-throughput architecture

key_factors.factor: Short staff tenure and dated distributed systems work
